probes.adversarialHypothesis: Multi-model deliberation may not improve reasoning if models share training data biases
searchQueries: multi-model ensemble bias shared training data
probes.reasoning: If models are trained on similar data, their blind spots may overlap, reducing the benefit of cross-critique.

probes.adversarialHypothesis: Local-first architecture may increase costs due to maintenance overhead
searchQueries: self-hosted vs cloud total cost of ownership research
probes.reasoning: Local infrastructure requires ongoing maintenance that cloud services handle automatically.
